signUpSubtitle: Create a buyer account to shop scrubs and uniforms.
passwordHint: Use 8+ characters — include uppercase, lowercase, and a digit.
fullNameHint: Enter your full name as it will appear on orders.

shell.tagline: Trusted by healthcare teams across Egypt
shell.trust3: Pay securely with COD or Instapay

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordMissingLower: Include at least one lowercase letter.
errors.passwordMissingUpper: Include at least one uppercase letter.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.

forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPasswordSuccessMessage: If your email is registered, you'll receive a message with a password reset link.
resetPasswordSuccessMessage: You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPasswordInvalidMessage: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
